name: Cairn
description: Balanced trail stones stacked two and three high — every redraw restacks the cairns without ever letting them topple.

code.style: --stone1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( /* widths are emitted once so each stone stays centered while it morphs; the top stone is the middle one's shadow, so they share an ink */ --stone2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --w1: @r(52, 78); --w2: @r(30, 50); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 10%; height: 24%; left: calc((100 - @var(--w1)) / 2 * 1%); width: calc(@var(--w1) * 1%); border-radius: 46%; background: var(--stone1); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 32%; height: 21%; left: calc((100 - @var(--w2)) / 2 * 1%); width: calc(@var(--w2) * 1%); border-radius: 46%; background: @var(--stone2); box-shadow: 0 calc(-260px / @Y) 0 calc(-20px / @Y) @var(--stone2); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
